user_message: Just got this from Thomas Okafor at Azure Ridge Partners -- I need help figuring out account health. The customer escalated this morning.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Azure Ridge Partners: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF08-J trap (Confidence stated without rationale); produces complete Signal assessment with confidence, opportunity hypothesis with value-lever framing, deduplication ch
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF08-J failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF08-J failure mode (Confidence stated without rationale)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF08-J -- Confidence stated without rationale
